subject: Issue with recent charge
body:
Hi,

I see a charge on my card that I don't recognize from your company. I'm not even sure I have an active subscription. Could this be fraud? I'm worried about my financial security.

Please look into this ASAP.

Sarah Kim

subject: Frustrated with the service
body:
I've been a customer for 3 years and the quality has gone downhill. The app is slow, features I used to rely on are broken, and I'm considering switching to a competitor.

I'm not sure if I want to cancel, complain about my last billing statement which was too high, or if there's something you can do to make this right. What are my options?

subject: Data export not working
body:
The 'Export to CSV' button on the reports page does nothing when I click it. No error message, no download. I've tried Chrome and Firefox.

Is this a known issue? Is there a workaround? I need this data for a board presentation tomorrow morning.

subject: RE: Meeting follow-up
body:
Hey,

Thanks for the demo yesterday. I have a few questions:
1. Does your API support webhooks?
2. What's your uptime SLA?
3. Can we get a custom integration for our CRM?

Also, there might be a security concern — one of our team members received a phishing email that looked like it came from your domain. Can you investigate?

Best,
Alex
thread_history: From: sales@ourcompany.com — Hi Alex, great meeting you! Let me know if you have questions.

subject: Compliance documentation request
body:
Hello,

We are undergoing a SOC 2 audit and need your latest Data Processing Agreement (DPA), security certifications, and information about your data residency options.

Could you also clarify whether data stored in the EU region is ever transferred outside the EU?

This is time-sensitive — our auditors need this by end of week.

Regards,
Priya Sharma
Head of Compliance, FinTech Global

subject: Can't figure out integration
body:
I've been trying to set up the Zapier integration but the documentation seems outdated. The screenshots don't match what I see in the app.

I also tried the API directly but kept getting 401 errors even with new API keys. Is my account plan limiting this? Or is my billing frozen?

At this point I don't know if it's a bug or if I'm doing something wrong. Help?

subject: Account lockout after password change
body:
I changed my password 2 days ago through the app settings. Since then, I can log in on the web but the mobile app keeps saying 'session expired'. I've reinstalled the app twice already.

I'm also seeing login attempts from an IP address I don't recognize in my security log. Is my account compromised?

subject: Upgrade pricing question
body:
Hi,

I'm on the Basic plan and thinking about upgrading but your pricing page shows different rates than what I was quoted by your sales team last month.

Also, if I upgrade mid-cycle, will I lose my current data or settings? I've heavily customized my dashboard and don't want to start over.

Lastly, do you offer nonprofit discounts? We're a registered 501(c)(3).

Thanks,
Mark
